name: Cornell Barbecue Chicken Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
2. Marinade chicken in the sauce for at least 1-2 hours (overnight is good).
3. Baste chicken while cooking.
4. Apply sauce to a rack of broilers with wide brushes over portable barbecue pits.
5. Cook on one side, then flip an empty rack on top and cook the other side.
6. Serve with a roll and coleslaw.
